name: Irensei
author: Abstract Games factory
description: Irensei (囲連星) is a Go/Gomoku hybrid on a 19×19 Go board. Players alternately place stones; the goal is an unbroken line of seven, but every stone of that line must lie inside the central 15×15 area (the outer two lines on each side never count). Black must make exactly seven and loses on an overline of eight or more; White wins with seven or more. Go captures, suicide and ko rules also apply.
